## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` and `go test -race ./...` pass
- [ ] `make lint`, `make ascii-check`, and `make doc-check` pass
- [ ] Tests cover the change; any new invariant is asserted (property or example)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if the change is user-visible
- [ ] Docs or an ADR updated if a decision, contract, or invariant changed
- [ ] No secrets, provider keys, or request/response bodies are logged or committed
